entries.title: Claude Code leak used to push infostealer malware on GitHub
entries.summary: Threat actors are exploiting the recent Claude Code source code leak by using fake GitHub repositories to deliver Vidar information-stealing malware. [...]

entries.title: Drift loses $280 million as hackers seize Security Council powers
entries.summary: The Drift Protocol lost at least $280 million after a threat actor took control of its Security Council administrative powers in a planned, sophisticated operation. [...]

entries.title: Residential proxies evaded IP reputation checks in 78% of 4B sessions
entries.summary: Researchers warn that residential proxies used to route malicious traffic are a big problem for IP reputation systems, as there is no clear distinction between attackers and legitimate users. [...]

entries.title: Adversaries Exploit Vacant Homes to Intercept Mail in Hybrid Cybercrime
entries.summary: Threat actors are exploiting vacant homes as "drop addresses" to intercept mail and enable fraud. Flare shows how postal services and fake identities are abused to turn mail into a fraud vector. [...]

entries.title: New Progress ShareFile flaws can be chained in pre-auth RCE attacks
entries.summary: Two vulnerabilities in Progress ShareFile, an enterprise-grade secure file transfer solution, can be chained to enable unauthenticated file exfiltration from affected environments. [...]

entries.title: Medtech giant Stryker fully operational after data-wiping attack
entries.summary: Stryker Corporation, one of the world's leading medical technology companies, says it's fully operational three weeks after many of its systems were wiped out in a cyberattack claimed by the Iranian-linked Handala hacktivist group. [...]

entries.title: Critical Cisco IMC auth bypass gives attackers Admin access
entries.summary: Cisco has patched several critical and high-severity vulnerabilities, including an Integrated Management Controller (IMC) authentication bypass that enables attackers to gain Admin access. [...]

entries.title: Microsoft links Classic Outlook issue to email delivery problems
entries.summary: Microsoft is investigating a known issue that prevents some Classic Outlook users from sending emails via Outlook.com. [...]

entries.title: Over 14,000 F5 BIG-IP APM instances still exposed to RCE attacks
entries.summary: Internet security watchdog Shadowserver has found over 14,000 BIG-IP APM instances exposed online amid ongoing attacks exploiting a critical-severity remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability. [...]

entries.title: New CrystalRAT malware adds RAT, stealer and prankware features
entries.summary: A new malware-as-a-service called CrystalRAT is being promoted on Telegram, offering remote access, data theft, keylogging, and clipboard hijacking capabilities. [...]

entries.title: Apple expands iOS 18 updates to more iPhones to block DarkSword attacks
entries.summary: Apple has now made it possible for more iPhones still running iOS 18 to receive security updates that protect against the actively exploited DarkSword exploit kit. [...]

entries.title: Hackers exploit TrueConf zero-day to push malicious software updates
entries.summary: Hackers have targeted TrueConf conference servers in attacks that exploit a zero-day vulnerability, allowing them to execute arbitrary files on all connected endpoints. [...]

entries.title: New EvilTokens service fuels Microsoft device code phishing attacks
entries.summary: A new malicious kit called EvilTokens integrates device code phishing capabilities, allowing attackers to hijack Microsoft accounts and provide advanced features for business email compromise attacks. [...]

entries.title: 'NoVoice' Android malware on Google Play infected 2.3 million devices
entries.summary: A new Android malware dubbed NoVoice exploited known vulnerabilities to gain root access and has been distributed through more than 50 apps on Google Play Store, with at least 2.3 million downloads. [...]

entries.title: Routine Access Is Powering Modern Intrusions, a New Threat Report Finds
entries.summary: Modern intrusions increasingly start with valid credentials and routine access, not exploits. Blackpoint Cyber's upcoming threat report shows how VPN abuse, RMM tools, and social engineering drive most incidents. [...]
